title: Tandem Repeat Array Simulator Configuration
description: Schema for the YAML config that drives the tandem repeat simulator. See simulator_implementation_plan.md and tr_structural_taxonomy_v1.md §5 for context.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Increment when introducing breaking changes.

seed.description: Top-level RNG seed. Sub-streams are derived deterministically.

mutation_rate.description: Per-base point mutation rate applied in the final noise pass.

indel_rate.description: Per-base indel rate (split 50/50 between insertions and deletions) applied in the final noise pass.

output.description: Output prefix. Files written: PREFIX.fa, PREFIX.truth.tsv, PREFIX.periods.tsv.

array_id.description: FASTA record ID. Defaults to basename of output prefix.

templates.description: Named template objects. Structural blocks reference templates by ID.

structure.description: Ordered sequence of blocks that compose the array.

modifiers.description: Modifiers applied to the assembled sequence before post-generation events.

post_generation.description: Structural events applied after blocks and modifiers. Each event names its target block (zero-indexed into `structure`); the target must be a HOR or SIMPLE_TR block. Copy and slot indices on the event are 1-indexed within that target block.

monomer_length_bp.description: Length of each slot consensus in bp.

k.description: Number of distinct slots per HOR unit. Use a `monomer` template for k=1.

sequence.description: Explicit slot-1 sequence. Used when source = 'sequence'.

file.description: Path to a FASTA file containing the slot-1 sequence. Used when source = 'file'.

gc_content.description: G+C fraction for random slot-1 generation. Ignored if source != 'random'.

inter_slot_divergence.description: Target pairwise divergence between slots. 0 = identical (regime A). 0.15 = 85% identity (regime B). 0.5+ = regime C (HOR collapses to simple_TR at HOR-unit width).

template.description: Name of a template in `templates`. Must be of type HOR_slots.

n_copies.description: Number of HOR units to lay down.

template.description: Name of a template in `templates`. May be `monomer` or `HOR_slots` (in the latter case only slot 1 is used).

offset_bp.description: Phase shift in bp. Positive = insert that many bases; negative = delete from end of preceding block. |offset_bp| should be less than half a monomer length to avoid undefined behaviour.

length_bp.description: Length of the non-tandem block to insert.

kind.description: Composition profile. retro_like produces a synthetic LTR-internal-LTR structure; segdup_like copies a random subsequence of the existing output.

target.description: Range over which wobble is applied. 'all' = whole sequence. 'block:N' = the Nth block (zero-indexed). 'range:START-END' = explicit bp range. Only 'all' supported in MVP.

amplitude_bp.description: Target std (random_walk) or amplitude (sinusoidal) of the per-row shift, in bp.

period_rows.description: For sinusoidal model: period of the wobble in rows. For random_walk: smoothing window. 0 = aperiodic.

realisation.description: Method for realising non-integer drift. Only integer_edits supported in MVP (residual-accumulator insertions/deletions).

block.description: Zero-indexed position into `structure`. The targeted block must be of type HOR or SIMPLE_TR.

at_copy.description: Which HOR copy within the targeted block receives the hybrid monomer (1-indexed).

slot.description: Which slot within that HOR copy is replaced by the hybrid (1-indexed).

source_slots.description: Two slot indices whose 5' and 3' halves are fused to form the hybrid.

split_fraction.description: Fraction of the original slot length contributed by source_slots[0]. Default 0.5 = clean halves.

block.description: Zero-indexed position into `structure`. The targeted block must be of type HOR or SIMPLE_TR.

start_copy.description: First copy (1-indexed) within the targeted block to invert.

length_copies.description: Number of HOR units (or monomers) to invert.

block.description: Zero-indexed position into `structure`. The targeted block must be of type HOR or SIMPLE_TR.

start_copy.description: First copy (1-indexed) within the targeted block to duplicate.

length_copies.description: Number of HOR units (or monomers) to duplicate.

block.description: Zero-indexed position into `structure`. The targeted block must be of type HOR or SIMPLE_TR.

start_copy.description: First copy (1-indexed) within the targeted block to delete.

length_copies.description: Number of HOR units (or monomers) to delete.
